title: Hot Springs Church Map
area_source: U.S. Census — Hot Springs city land area
notes: OSM is the mapped seed. Assessor-only parcels are campus-collapsed (within 400m with similar names) before inclusion. Field-review exclusions live in data/raw/overrides.csv. Add manual churches in enrichment.csv with name, lat, lon. Optional SOS nonprofits live in data/raw/sos_churches.json.
